name: USS PC-801 (PC-801)
events: 7 Feb 1945 USS Cabrilla (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Lauerman, USN) conducted exercises off San Diego together with USS PC-801 (Lt.(jg.) W.D. Wallace, USNR).
8 Feb 1945 USS Cabrilla (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Lauerman, USN) conducted exercises off San Diego together with USS Duxbury Bay (Cdr. F.N. Howe, USN) and USS PC-801 (Lt.(jg.) W.D. Wallace, USNR).
